title: New Uses of Religious Imagery in Rebuild SPIDERS
display_title: New Uses of Religious Imagery in Rebuild SPIDERS
wikitext:
[]: New Uses of Religious Imagery in Rebuild (SPIDERS)             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Jul 16, 2009 7:54 pm The only one I can remember is that the Systema Sephirotica was used as the water purification plant. But there MUST be more, right?

[]:             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Thu Jul 16, 2009 8:09 pm I'll take Failed EVA-04 S2 Engine Activation Test for 500, Alex.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Jul 16, 2009 8:17 pm That's been there.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jul 16, 2009 8:38 pm I decided to make this a Rebuild-general thread for the lulz.

[]: Re: New Uses of Religious Imagery in Rebuild (SPIDERS)             Quote Post by schismatics » Thu Jul 16, 2009 8:39 pm NAveryW wrote: The only one I can remember is that the Systema Sephirotica was used as the water purification plant. But there MUST be more, right?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Jul 16, 2009 8:39 pm So are we not going to bother digging up the old thread on the subject?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jul 16, 2009 8:40 pm NAveryW wrote: So are we not going to bother digging up the old thread on the subject?

[]:             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Thu Jul 16, 2009 8:45 pm NAveryW wrote: That's been there.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Jul 16, 2009 9:09 pm I think he means "cross-shaped explosions"

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Jul 16, 2009 9:19 pm We already knew that explosion would be there from the preview at the end of 1.0 . ...Well, we would know it'd be there if the preview actually showed anything from the film.

[]:             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Thu Jul 16, 2009 9:24 pm Ornette wrote: I think he means "cross-shaped explosions"

[]: Re: New Uses of Religious Imagery in Rebuild (SPIDERS)             Quote Post by OKdesuKA » Thu Jul 16, 2009 9:25 pm schismatics wrote: NAveryW wrote: The only one I can remember is that the Systema Sephirotica was used as the water purification plant. But there MUST be more, right?

[]: Re: New Uses of Religious Imagery in Rebuild (SPIDERS)             Quote Post by Maximilian » Thu Jul 16, 2009 9:55 pm OKdesuKA wrote: You know I always did wonder how they lived without actual water in the ocean, unless LCL can substitute for water? I always remembered Shinji's disgust when he was marinated with it.

[]: Re: New Uses of Religious Imagery in Rebuild (SPIDERS)             Quote Post by Adam » Fri Jul 17, 2009 6:49 am Maximilian wrote: I'm pretty sure that's just water contaminated with Adam Blood... which I guess is pretty much LCL... Huh, that just occurred to me. Anyway I'm sure there's still water in there, it's just mixed with the LCL.

[]: Re: New Uses of Religious Imagery in Rebuild (SPIDERS)             Quote Post by DevilzillA » Fri Jul 17, 2009 9:29 am OKdesuKA wrote: You know I always did wonder how they lived without actual water in the ocean, unless LCL can substitute for water?

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Fri Jul 17, 2009 9:35 am Surely the Red water itself is a reference to the plagues of Egypt. "Rivers running red with blood"? It's not really new, but there is sort of an expansion when they go to the Aquarium showing all the wildlife saved. Meaning that most of the fish and animals in the oceans have died out, just like in the Bible. Before in the series it was just Antarctica that turned red wasn't it? The rest of the world was ok. The killing of the sea-life makes it truly look like a plague.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Jul 17, 2009 9:48 am I Accidentally Dracula wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Fri Jul 17, 2009 9:51 am It's from the 2.0 preview at the end of 1.0. I'm guessing it's from 1.11?

[]:             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Fri Jul 17, 2009 10:42 am NemZ wrote: Hey now... is there a decent fansub out somewhere already? All I've managed to find is a raw camrip with some guy's head in the frame most of the film.

[]: Re: New Uses of Religious Imagery in Rebuild (SPIDERS)             Quote Post by Annihilator » Fri Jul 17, 2009 10:51 am NAveryW wrote: The only one I can remember is that the Systema Sephirotica was used as the water purification plant. But there MUST be more, right?
